name: Ben Carson
subject: Will you support me on Tax Day?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Carson America Exploratory Committee
body:
Peter, it's Tax Day, and I'm here in Columbia, South Carolina.

I'm getting ready to speak at a Balanced Budget Amendment Rally,
but I wanted to send you a quick email on this important day.

It's an important day because every American is reminded that our
tax code is a disaster.

It's too burdensome, too complex, and it costs our families and
businesses too much money and heartburn.

We need a Balanced Budget Amendment because we can't trust
Washington politicians to restrain themselves.

We need a simple, proportional tax code that eliminates the need
for complex, power-hungry agencies like the IRS.

If you like these ideas, I need to know.

Please show your support for me as I determine whether I should
run for the presidency.

Your friend,

Ben
Sent from my iPhone

Donate: bencarson.com/explore/landing/bd/page-hf

Donate by Mail:
http://camp2016-email.bencarson.com/carson-america-exploratory-committee-contribution-form.pdf

Paid for by the Carson America Exploratory Committee

This message was intended for: dpwillis67@gmail.com
You were added to the system April 11, 2015.

name: Robby Mook, Hillary for America
subject: My first request:
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY HILLARY FOR AMERICA
body:
So glad you're a part of this! | [](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=6&ms=MjI0ODg0OTES1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NTQxNTY3NjA3S0&mt=1&rt=0) Welcome to the campaign -- we're so glad to have you. We've got one goal here: For Hillary Clinton to secure the Democratic nomination and then win 270 electoral votes to become President. [**Help kick it off. Chip in $5 or more and become a founding donor right now.**](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=5&ms=MjI0ODg0OTES1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NTQxNTY3NjA3S0&mt=1&rt=0) That's our goal, but the truth is, this campaign is not about Hillary Clinton. It's about Americans who are trying to build better lives for themselves and their families. Those families are counting on us to win -- they're counting on a president who will be their champion. Here's how we're going to do it: We're humble. We're not taking anything for granted. We will out-work our opponents and fight for every vote we can win. We're disciplined. We're driven by strategy, not tactics or the horserace. There will be rough days -- but we'll bounce back and work even harder. And just as importantly, we'll have fun. This is going to be tough, but it's an incredible privilege and honor to try and elect the 45th President of the United States. We won't forget that. **I'm so grateful to be on board as campaign manager -- and I'm glad you're a part of this work. I hope you'll step up and own a piece of it:** **[https://www.hillaryclinton.com/donate](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=8&ms=MjI0ODg0OTES1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NTQxNTY3NjA3S0&mt=1&rt=0)**

Thanks,

Robby

Robby Mook
Campaign Manager
Hillary for America [](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=3&ms=MjI0ODg0OTES1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NTQxNTY3NjA3S0&mt=1&rt=0)
---

| PAID FOR BY HILLARY FOR AMERICA
---
Contributions or gifts to Hillary for America are not tax deductible.
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. [Click here to unsubscribe](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=2&ms=MjI0ODg0OTES1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NTQxNTY3NjA3S0&mt=1&rt=0).
Hillary for America, PO Box 5256, New York, NYY 10185
[Privacy Policy](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=7&ms=MjI0ODg0OTES1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NTQxNTY3NjA3S0&mt=1&rt=0)

name: Senator Lindsey Graham
subject: ObamaCare + Tax Day = Nightmare
body:
| |

---
---
|
Dear Friend,

Thanks to President Obama and his signature law of ObamaCare, April 15th - Tax Day - is an even greater burden for hard-working Americans.

For the first time this year, taxpayers had to verify to the IRS that they have health insurance or risk paying a fine. Meanwhile, businesses are uncertain how long their health insurance costs are going to continue skyrocketing and how new regulations are going to hurt their bottom line, so they hesitate to hire new workers.

**All of this adds up to an economy that can't get back on track and middle class families who can't seem to get ahead. It's a nightmare.**

It's time to unleash the American spirit and get government out of the way so the private sector can create jobs. It's time to stop burdening our citizens and businesses with so many onerous taxes and regulations. And it's time to talk about realistic, conservative solutions to tough problems facing our country.

As I travel around the country listening to Americans, our conservative message is resonating. If you agree too, **[please take action right now by making a generous contribution to Security Through Strength of $15, $25, $50, or more to support my "testing the waters" effort for a potential presidential run](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/27147477:26113842807:m:1:877327319:57CA1F41D1290F60AC51453AB4EA3822:r)**.

Friend, you can count on me to continue fighting for a simpler, flatter tax code so that future April 15ths aren't as tough as this one. **[Thank you for continuing your strong support!](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/27147477:26113842807:m:1:877327319:57CA1F41D1290F60AC51453AB4EA3822:r)**

Sincerely,

Senator Lindsey Graham

P.S. My decision as to what the future holds will come soon, but in the meantime I hope you will **[please support Security Through Strength today](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/27147477:26113842807:m:1:877327319:57CA1F41D1290F60AC51453AB4EA3822:r)**. We need to get our country back on track and end this economic nightmare for American families.

[](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/27147477:26113842807:m:1:877327319:57CA1F41D1290F60AC51453AB4EA3822:r) |

_Security Through Strength is a 527 political organization registered with the Internal Revenue Service._

This message was intended for: [dpwillis67@gmail.com](mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com)
You were added to the system April 14, 2015. For more information
[click here](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/iWUO1Yr1Nt).
[Update your preferences](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/oWUO1Yr1Nt) | [Unsubscribe](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/oWUO1Yr1Nt)
